meaning: 阿维尼翁[法国东南部城市]
examples: Was it from Avignon? I hope it is not to say that your sister is worse.
In the 14th century, Avignon was in fact the refuge of the Popes fleeing the dangers of Rome.
At least we know where to find Claridon in Avignon, as the letter to Ernst Scoville instructed.
And there lay Les Demoiselles d'Avignon (1907) for many, many years, unloved and unwanted, gathering dust.
The employment minister, Elisabeth Guigou, just did so in Avignon, but was then trounced.
